text.message: Are you seriously stealing from me
I’m by far in last place
sorry guys that was a bad trade
i dont get road or army..
You’re by far in best position
org is about to be on 7 w road and a settle
I need to build 5 more points
when i finish last I just want to remind you that you said i was in the best position blue
kinda feel like it's just king making if i trade you
Ill give u all the road materials
ur not king making.. just taking road
nah youll have to clear your hand to me otherwise you just win
need to rob them if you can
I have a wood if you need it
